meaning: Symphony(贝多芬的)<<英雄交响曲>>即<<降E大调第三交响曲>>)
examples: It is not by chance that the Funeral March is not the last movement of the Eroica Symphony, but the second.
They will perform Beethoven's Eroica concerto tonight.
They will perform Beethoven's Eroica at the concerto tonight.
He remembers the first time the orchestra performed the Eroica Symphony, with a pared-down ensemble similar in size to the one Beethoven used.
He's written violin concertos and chamber music performed by some of today's top classical musicians, such as Yo-Yo Ma, Renee Fleming and the Eroica Trio.
